string.name: app_name
string.comment: App name displayed in the device launcher and app drawer

string.name: short_description
string.comment: Short description shown in app store listings (Play Store, F-Droid)

resources.string: Launches hidden activities and creates shortcuts for installed apps

string.name: nav_all
string.comment: Tab label showing all installed apps

string.name: nav_favorites
string.comment: Tab label showing favorited activities

string.name: nav_recents
string.comment: Tab label showing recently launched activities

string.name: title_fragment_package_list
string.comment: Screen title for the list of installed packages/apps

string.name: title_fragment_activity_list
string.comment: Screen title showing activities within a selected package

string.name: title_dialog_disclaimer
string.comment: Dialog title for the warning dialog shown on first launch

string.name: title_dialog_icon_picker
string.comment: Dialog title for selecting an icon when creating or editing a shortcut

string.name: dialog_progress_loading
string.comment: Progress message shown while loading the list of installed apps

string.name: dialog_disclaimer
string.comment: Warning text in the disclaimer dialog about accessing hidden/advanced features

resources.string: This app gives access to features not normally visible to users. Some options may not work as expected or may not be safe to use. Do you understand and still want to proceed?

string.name: context_action_launch
string.comment: Context menu action to launch an activity normally (without root)

string.name: context_action_launch_as_root
string.comment: Context menu action to launch an activity using root/administrator privileges

string.name: context_action_shortcut
string.comment: Context menu action to create a home screen shortcut for an activity

string.name: context_action_shortcut_as_root
string.comment: Context menu action to create a home screen shortcut with root privileges

string.name: context_action_edit
string.comment: Context menu action to edit an existing shortcut's properties

string.name: context_action_share_shortcut
string.comment: Context menu action to share a created shortcut as a link

string.name: context_action_favorite_add
string.comment: Context menu action to add an activity to the favorites list

string.name: context_action_favorite_remove
string.comment: Context menu action to remove an activity from the favorites list

string.name: context_action_share
string.comment: App bar action to share the current activity or app info

string.name: label_name
string.comment: Form label for the shortcut name field

string.name: label_package
string.comment: Form label for the package name field

string.name: label_class
string.comment: Form label for the activity class name field

string.name: label_icon
string.comment: Form label for the shortcut icon selection

string.name: label_menu
string.comment: Accessibility label for the overflow menu button in the app bar

string.name: label_private
string.comment: Badge label indicating an activity is private (not exported and requires root)

string.name: starting_activity
string.comment: Toast message shown when starting an activity. %s is the activity name or class

string.name: creating_application_shortcut
string.comment: Toast message shown when creating a shortcut. %s is the app/activity name

string.name: error
string.comment: Generic error dialog title

string.name: error_creating_shortcut
string.comment: Error message displayed when shortcut creation fails

string.name: error_icons
string.comment: Error message shown when app icons fail to load

string.name: error_invalid_icon_resource
string.comment: Error message for invalid or non-existent icon resource

string.name: error_invalid_icon_format
string.comment: Error message when the selected icon file format is not supported

string.name: error_verbose_pin_shortcut
string.comment: Error message when the device launcher does not support pinning shortcuts

resources.string: Current launcher does not support "PinShortcut". Unable to create shortcut.

string.name: error_invalid_activity_link
string.comment: Error message for invalid deep link or activity reference

string.name: warning_root_check
string.comment: Warning toast when root privileges are not available on the device

resources.string: Warning: Root privileges are probably not available on this device.

string.name: exception_invalid_component_name
string.comment: Error message for dangerous or invalid component names. %s is the problematic component

resources.string: Invalid or potentially harmful component name: %s

string.name: exception_command_error
string.comment: Error message when a shell command fails. %d is error code, %s is command output

string.name: category_title_about
string.comment: Settings category header for about and info section

string.name: action_view_source
string.comment: Settings action to view the app's source code on GitHub

string.name: summary_action_view_source
string.comment: Description for the view source code setting

resources.string: The source code of this App is available for reading and modifying on GitHub. Feel free to send us pull requests with improvements and bugfixes.

string.name: action_view_translation
string.comment: Settings action to open the translation contribute page

string.name: summary_action_view_translation
string.comment: Description encouraging users to translate the app

resources.string: If you are enjoying Activity Launcher, please consider translating the App into your language.

string.name: action_view_bugs
string.comment: Settings action to report bugs or issues

string.name: summary_action_view_bugs
string.comment: Description for the bug report setting

resources.string: Please submit your suggestions or issues on our GitHub project page.

string.name: action_filter
string.comment: Content description for the filter/search icon in the app bar

string.name: filter_hint
string.comment: Hint text in the filter search input field

string.name: activity_settings
string.comment: Navigation item label for the settings screen

string.name: settings_hide_private
string.comment: Settings switch to hide private/unexported activities

string.name: settings_summary_hide_private
string.comment: Description explaining the hide private activities setting

resources.string: Hide private (unexported and disabled) activities, that cannot be started without root access

string.name: settings_allow_root
string.comment: Settings switch to enable privileged/root mode

string.name: settings_summary_allow_root
string.comment: Description for the privileged mode setting

resources.string: Allow launching private activities by using root privileges

string.name: settings_language
string.comment: Settings option for app language selection

string.name: settings_theme
string.comment: Settings option for app theme selection

string.name: theme_default
string.comment: Theme option to follow system theme

string.name: theme_light
string.comment: Theme option for light color scheme

string.name: theme_dark
string.comment: Theme option for dark color scheme
